title: Squares of a Sorted Array
prompt: Given an integer array `nums` sorted in non-decreasing order, return an array of the squares of each number, also sorted in non-decreasing order. Solve in O(n).
constraints: nums is sorted in non-decreasing order.
hints: The largest square comes from one of the two ends.
Two pointers: compare absolute values and write to the back of the result.

optimal.approach: Two pointers from both ends; fill result back-to-front with the larger square.

pitfalls: Filling front-to-back leads to O(n log n).
followups: Without using extra space (overwrite the input).
